# xno-skills

> A TypeScript library, CLI, and MCP server for Nano (XNO). Pairs with Open Wallet Standard (OWS) for secure key custody — send, receive, change representatives, convert units, validate addresses, sign/verify messages, and payment request workflows.

All wallet custody delegates to OWS. Agents never handle seeds or mnemonics directly. All amounts use BigInt — never JS `Number` for raw units.

## Essential

- [README.md](README.md): Full documentation — installation, CLI usage, MCP server setup, API reference (seed/mnemonic derivation, BIP44, Legacy, unit conversion, QR codes, security notes)
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Non-discoverable agent conventions — OWS requirement, ESM `.js` imports, spending limits, persistence paths, MCP tooling patterns

## Source

- [src/index.ts](src/index.ts): Public API exports
- [src/cli.ts](src/cli.ts): CLI implementation (wallets, balance, send, receive, change, submit-block, history, sign/verify, convert, qr, validate, rpc, block construction)
- [src/mcp.ts](src/mcp.ts): MCP server — wallet custody, payment requests, allowances
